summary: `while` loops repeat while a condition is True. Ensure counter variable changes to avoid infinite loops.
oneLineSummary: while loops repeat execution as long as a condition evaluates to True.
keyTakeaways: while-else executes if no break occurs.

memoryTricks.trick: Think of a security guard checking passes WHILE people enter.

commonErrors.fix: Ensure loop condition updates inside block
